title: Senior Performance Planner
description:
Scope of role:

The role sits within OMD’s performance team. The team has a market-leading position in implementational / executional management. As a senior performance planner, you will be tasked with the planning, optimization and activation of digital campaigns.

Reporting Structure:
You report to the Performance Director / Performance Manager in the team

Key Responsibilities:

  • Plan, setup and manage all digital advertising channels primarily Paid Search (Google Ads, Bing Ads), TikTok and Facebook Ads Manager
  • Monitor and optimize channels and campaigns to achieve business objectives with efficiencies and scale
  • Assist in the preparation and rationale of performance marketing recommendations and annual plan presentations
  • Ensure budgets are tracked and spent efficiently
  • Perform data analysis and provide thought leadership based on consumer insights where relevant
  • Comfortable dealing with numbers and dealing with technology platforms, ability to articulate and put together sound recommendations
  • Develop and update client performance reports and analyse and format data, gather costs, supply insights and commentary.
  • Clear verbal and written communication skills
  • Competency with figures and simple calculations - including pivot tables, charts and formulae
  • Use Microsoft Excel to manipulate data and create client facing reports for Search, Display, YouTube, Social
  • Own budget planning & tracking (media finance) for the campaigns under your belt

Required Skills:

  • Minimum 2 years of SEM activation and optimization experience
  • Minimum 2 years of Social Ads setup experience
  • Minimum 1 year of planning experience, with exposure in omnichannel (Programmatic, Offline, etc.) planning considered a plus
  • Basic experience of pulling Campaign Manager Floodlight reports is required
  • Knowledge of Programmatic (DV360, TTD) media planning and setup is a plus
  • Experience with SA360, Google Analytics, or Adobe Analytics is a plus
  • Attention to detail is a must; accuracy in work is the top KPI
  • Able to articulate and communicate clearly and persuasively
  • Able to multitask and manage expectations of multiple stakeholders
  • Digital savvy, with specific proficiency at MS Suite: Excel, Word, PowerPoint
  • Excellent verbal and written communication skills

Personal Attributes:

  • Strong attention to detail
  • Prior experience in a media agency preferred
  • A ‘Can Do’ attitude
  • Tenacious
  • Business savvy
  • Persuasive
  • Ability to present and communicate ideas in a coherent and effective manner
  • Great interpersonal and communication skills internally, with media owners and clients
  • Be a proactive self-starter and ability to handle multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment under tight deadlines

postedCompany.description:
OMD is the world’s largest media network, with more than 14,000 people working across more than 100 countries.

At OMD, We Create What’s Next — delivering creative media solutions to drive sustainable growth for the world’s leading brands. Named the best-performing global media network overall by RECMA, the highest-ranked media agency network on the Effie Effectiveness Index, and Media Network of the Year at the 2024 Cannes Festival of Media, OMD is a leader in innovation, creativity, and cultural relevance.
postedCompany.name: OMD SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
